title: O.P. Jindal Global University Hosts the 3rd India
description: Tokyo [Japan], July 6: O.P. Jindal Global University (JGU) successfully convened the 3rd India-Japan Higher Education Forum 2026 on the theme 'Shaping Universities of the Future in the Era of Human and Artificial Intelligence.' The Forum in Tokyo brought together senior university leaders, diplomats, policymakers, academics and students from India and Japan for a substantive dialogue on higher education, academic mobility, research collaboration, technology, sustainability and education diplomacy. The Forum brought together a former Prime Minister of Japan, a distinguished Indian parliamentarian, diplomats and senior leaders of Japan's leading universities to shape the future of higher education in the age of artificial intelligence at a defining moment in the India-Japan Special Strategic and Global Partnership.

title: Yvette Cooper warns AI poses 'Hiroshima-style threat to humanity' without global rules
description: Artificial intelligence poses a "Hiroshima-like risk" to humanity if not regulated properly, Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper has warned.
content:
The Foreign Secretary also said the world was encountering a dangerous moment, referencing the US's withdrawal as "guarantor of global security" and more active conflicts than any year since 1945.

title: Beyond AI Training: How TAWAI Studio is Building a Scalable AI Business Ecosystem
description: New Delhi [India], July 6: India's Artificial Intelligence market is entering a new phase of growth. While the first wave focused on AI adoption and awareness, the next phase will be defined by organizations capable of building scalable products, developing skilled talent, and creating proprietary intellectual property. As businesses across sectors accelerate AI integration, the demand is shifting from generic training programs to comprehensive AI ecosystems that combine education, enterprise solutions, and product innovation.

title: Labor backs using government contracts to protect workers from AI

title: Can Sandisk extend its historic AI-driven rally?
description: Sandisk has emerged as the best-performing stock in the S&P 500 during the first half of 2026, with its shares soaring around 800% year-to-date. The remarkable rally has been driven by the explosive growth in artificial intelligence infrastructure, making the company one of the biggest beneficiaries of the AI investment boom. (Sources: Yahoo Finance, MarketWatch, TradingView) AI memory boom powers historic rally

title: Drones Use Machine Learning to Predict Mechanical Failures, Researchers Say
description: Researchers have developed a system that enables drones to detect anomalies and predict mechanical failures in real time, according to a report. The system uses onboard sensors and machine learning algorithms to monitor variables such as motor current, vibration, and temperature, officials said. The development comes as unmanned aerial vehicles increasingly rely on artificial intelligence […]
